member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.AlarmReport.PrimeAlarmReportTestMethod
member.summary: This test method allows for the creation of flows that are dedicated to specific location codes.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.AlarmReport.PrimeAlarmReportTestMethod.#ctor(Prime.ConsoleService.IConsoleService,Prime.DatalogService.IDatalogService,Prime.TesterService.ITesterService)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.AlarmReport.PrimeAlarmReportTestMethod.OnlyTestInstanceName
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that determines if only the test instance name should be printed to ituff.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.AlarmReport.PrimeAlarmReportTestMethod.AppendCounterToInstances
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that determines if a counter should be enabled that increments for repeated instance names. This counter will be appended to the instance names for ituff printing.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.AlarmReport.PrimeAlarmReportTestMethod.OnlyPrintFinalAlarmInfo
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that determines if only the final alarm should be printed to ituff if multiple are present for a test instance.
